description: Lens Studio MCP liveness gate (cross-platform): before any mcp__lens-studio__* call, probe the lens-studio endpoint from .mcp.json and, if unreachable (Lens Studio crashed/quit), deny the call and halt the turn. macOS/Linux via bash /dev/tcp; Windows via PowerShell TcpClient. Dependency-free; fails open where neither shell is available.

hooks.command: sh -c 'command -v powershell >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$0" || exit 0' "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/mcp-liveness-check.ps1"
